A Record Built Case by Case. One Client at a Time.

We do not advertise our victories with press releases. Our clients' matters are confidential. But the record exists — in filed verdicts, in settled disputes, and in the executives, families, and business owners who called us when it mattered most.

40+ Cases Tried to Verdict
$500M+ In Client Assets Recovered / Protected
200+ Complex Matters Resolved
95% Favorable Outcome Rate
CIVIL LITIGATION

$18.2M Jury Verdict

Successfully represented a Los Angeles technology company in a complex breach of contract and misappropriation of trade secrets case. Secured full damages plus attorney's fees after a two-week jury trial in Los Angeles Superior Court.

CORPORATE DISPUTE

Partnership Dissolution — Full Asset Recovery

Represented a minority shareholder in a dispute involving a $35M commercial real estate portfolio. Obtained a favorable settlement following targeted discovery that revealed undisclosed distributions by the majority partner.

HIGH-ASSET DIVORCE

Complex Asset Division — Client Retained Business Interests

Represented an entrepreneur in a high-conflict divorce involving a privately held company, multiple real estate holdings, and offshore investment accounts. Secured structured settlement preserving full operational control of business.

ESTATE LITIGATION

Will Contest — Full Estate Recovered

Successfully contested a will that had been altered under undue influence in the client's elderly parent's final months. Proved incapacity and coercion via medical records and witness testimony. Full estate transferred to rightful heirs.

Past case results are provided for informational purposes only and do not guarantee or predict similar outcomes in future matters. Every legal matter is unique and depends on its specific facts and circumstances. The information on this page does not constitute legal advice. Results may include matters handled prior to joining Hargrove & Associates. Hargrove & Associates is a California law firm. Attorney advertising.
